scenario.title: Tailscale CLI availability re-checked without app restart
steps: Verify runtime health chips are visible in the instance header
Verify the chip reflects the current runtime state (not stale cached)
Capture checkpoint of the live runtime health indicator

assertions.description: The instance header renders with runtime health chips
The runtime health chip reflects the current runtime state as available
The instance detail shows CLI detection is fresh (not stale-cached)

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Tailscale CLI availability re-checked without app restart

![Instance header with live runtime health chips (not stale-cached)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/5a97847a79d4c57deb7b2f3f7cb407f27e68a358/openspec/changes/gh-231-tailscale-cli-detection/evidence/01-instance-runtime-health.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Open the app
2. Verify runtime health chips are visible in the instance header
3. Verify the chip reflects the current runtime state (not stale cached)
4. Capture checkpoint of the live runtime health indicator

</details>
